title: Grapple
description: Whenever you gain [gold]Block[/gold] this turn, deal [blue]5[/blue] damage to the enemy.
smart_description: Whenever you gain [gold]Block[/gold] this turn, deal [blue]{Amount}[/blue] damage to [gold]{OwnerName}[/gold].
notes: This is a debuff that triggers once per block gain during the turn it was applied. It is removed at the end of the turn.
